# Workplace AI

> AI-powered workplace productivity assistant for emails, meeting summaries, task planning, research, and chat.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Dashboard with productivity metrics and quick access to all AI tools.
- [Email Generator](/email): Generate professional emails with subject lines, body, and call-to-action.
- [Meeting Summarizer](/meetings): Turn raw meeting notes into executive summaries and action items.
- [Task Planner](/tasks): Prioritize tasks and build daily and weekly plans.
- [Research Assistant](/research): Summarize articles and extract key insights.
- [AI Chatbot](/chat): Conversational assistant for workplace productivity questions.
- [Settings](/settings): Privacy notices and local data management.
